text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Prez, happy birthday! Happy, happy birthday!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I appreciate it, Teio. Amidst the many well
wishes I've received, your straightforward
sincerity resonates the loudest.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Um, Prez? Recently, I've been thinking about a
lot of stuff. Like what would've happened if you'd
never been born...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Like, would I still be who I am today? You've
been my motivation from the start, so without
you, I don't think I'd be here, either.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I'm sure you would have been fine
regardless. Umamusume are guided by their
destinies, flowing ever forward like a rushing
river.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Both you and I stem from the source of that river,
and the flowing lineage of emperors and
monarchs will not dry up so easily. That is, as long
as we hold on to our dreams.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
As long as we hold on to our dreams... You
mean...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, one day our successors will
appear—those who we inspire and pass on the
torch to.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Teio, there is one thing I wish to ask of you. Can
you promise to keep navigating this immemorial
stream of fate with me?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I promise, Prez! And someday, we'll entrust
our Triple Crown dream to the next generation!
